---
title: "Life and Adventures of Count Beugnot . Edited by Charlotte M. Yonge. 2 vols."
---

## Life and Adventures of Count Beugnot . Edited by Charlotte M. Yonge. 2 vols.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1871
**Genre:** Edited translation
**Format:** Edited book

**Publisher:** London : Hurst and Blackett.

### Notes

Probably translated by Julian Yonge

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
